# Conclusion


---
<!-- trackio-cell
{"type": "markdown", "id": "cell_e753ee00d50c", "created_at": "2026-07-16T01:43:52+00:00", "title": "Executive summary", "pinned": true, "pinned_at": "2026-07-16T01:43:52+00:00"}
-->
Outcome: this is a partial reproduction, not an end-to-end rerun of ML-Agent. Claims 1–3 are exactly source-verified in arXiv v1, but the checkpoint, evaluator, RL code, and trajectories needed to reproduce the headline agent scores remain unreleased. Claim 4 is independently supported at mechanism level: a disclosed MiniLM proxy selected a 10-idea set with 0.9647 mean pairwise distance, above all 5,000 random subsets; Claim 5’s v1 reward branches are reproduced exactly. ArXiv v2 materially changes the comparison table, idea-selection description, CIFAR metric, and reward equation, so every conclusion is version-pinned.

| Scope & cost | This reproduction | Full replication |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Scope | Source audit, local smoke tests, MiniLM diversity proxy, exact reward tests | Train the 7B agent and evaluate 3 held-in plus 10 held-out tasks |
| Data | Disclosed 120-idea synthetic corpus; archived paper and public repo | Unreleased SFT/RL trajectories, prompts, and author-generated idea pools |
| Compute | Local CPU plus one successful T4-small Job; 48 GPU-running seconds | Paper reports 8 A100 GPUs for training; evaluator and trajectories are not public |
| Cost | All T4 attempts below USD 0.02 at the current USD 0.40/hour rate | Not independently estimable; v2 reports USD 322.81 pre-inference, with evaluation cost additional |

exit 1 · 0.3s


````python title=log_bundle.py
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""Attach the complete ML-Agent reproduction bundle as a Trackio artifact."""

from pathlib import Path

import trackio


ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]
BUNDLE = ROOT / "artifact_bundle"


def main() -> None:
    trackio.init(
        project="ml-agent-repro-17897-artifacts",
        name="complete-reproduction-bundle",
        config={
            "paper": "2505.23723",
            "openreview": "kcPPWaoegr",
            "official_commit": "15932e7525deb99d59f7416bbe8c75077cff3690",
            "scope": "partial reproduction with source verification and mechanism proxies",
        },
    )
    artifact = trackio.log_artifact(
        str(BUNDLE),
        name="reproduction-bundle",
        type="dataset",
        aliases=["challenge", "latest"],
        metadata={
            "paper": "2505.23723",
            "tags": ["icml2026-repro", "paper-kcPPWaoegr"],
        },
    )
    print(f"ARTIFACT_PROJECT={artifact.project}")
    print(f"ARTIFACT_NAME={artifact.name}")
    print(f"ARTIFACT_VERSION={artifact.version}")
    trackio.finish()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

````

````python title=log_bundle.py
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""Attach the complete ML-Agent reproduction bundle as a Trackio artifact."""

from pathlib import Path

import trackio


ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]
BUNDLE = ROOT / "artifact_bundle"


def main() -> None:
    trackio.init(
        project="ml-agent-repro-17897-artifacts",
        name="complete-reproduction-bundle",
        config={
            "paper": "2505.23723",
            "openreview": "kcPPWaoegr",
            "official_commit": "15932e7525deb99d59f7416bbe8c75077cff3690",
            "scope": "partial reproduction with source verification and mechanism proxies",
        },
    )
    artifact = trackio.log_artifact(
        str(BUNDLE),
        name="reproduction-bundle",
        type="dataset",
        aliases=["challenge", "latest"],
    )
    print(f"ARTIFACT_PROJECT={artifact.project}")
    print(f"ARTIFACT_NAME={artifact.name}")
    print(f"ARTIFACT_VERSION={artifact.version}")
    trackio.finish()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

````

````python title=log_bundle.py
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""Attach the complete ML-Agent reproduction bundle as a Trackio artifact."""

from pathlib import Path

import trackio


ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]
BUNDLE = ROOT / "artifact_bundle"


def main() -> None:
    trackio.init(
        project="ml-agent-repro-17897-artifacts",
        name="complete-reproduction-bundle",
        config={
            "paper": "2505.23723",
            "openreview": "kcPPWaoegr",
            "official_commit": "15932e7525deb99d59f7416bbe8c75077cff3690",
            "scope": "partial reproduction with source verification and mechanism proxies",
        },
    )
    artifact = trackio.log_artifact(
        str(BUNDLE),
        name="reproduction-bundle",
        type="dataset",
        aliases=["challenge", "latest"],
    )
    print(f"ARTIFACT_PROJECT={artifact.project}")
    print(f"ARTIFACT_NAME={artifact.name}")
    print(f"ARTIFACT_VERSION={artifact.version}")
    trackio.finish()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

````

---
<!-- trackio-cell
{"type": "markdown", "id": "cell_5e4574a3d367", "created_at": "2026-07-16T01:46:39+00:00", "title": "Download the complete reproduction"}
-->
The artifact below contains the archived arXiv v1/v2 PDFs and extracted text, official-release audit snapshot, all scripts and configs, local and T4 raw results, claim matrix, generated figures, failed-attempt provenance, and the all-green Posterly HTML/PDF/PNG/embed plus gate reports. Open the artifact card after publication to browse or download the Bucket-backed bundle; start with MANIFEST.md and README.md, then run the two smoke-test commands shown in README.md.

-->
**📦 Artifact** `ml-agent-repro-17897-artifacts/reproduction-bundle:v0` · dataset

https://huggingface.co/buckets/binzhango/repro-ml-agent-autonomous-ml-engineering-artifacts#ml-agent-repro-17897-artifacts/reproduction-bundle:v0


---
<!-- trackio-cell
{"type": "markdown", "id": "cell_234b8f06f46f", "created_at": "2026-07-16T01:48:43+00:00", "title": "Public dataset mirror"}
-->
A public repository mirror of the complete bundle is available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/binzhango/ml-agent-repro-17897-results. It exposes 37 files (10.0 MB) and carries the icml2026-repro and paper-kcPPWaoegr tags; the Trackio artifact remains the canonical Bucket-backed download required by the challenge.


---
<!-- trackio-cell
{"type": "markdown", "id": "cell_1836309e1816", "created_at": "2026-07-16T01:51:14+00:00", "title": "Hugging Face collection"}
-->
The public collection groups the Trackio Space, canonical logbook artifact Bucket, Trackio experiment Bucket, and dataset mirror: https://huggingface.co/collections/binzhango/ml-agent-icml-2026-reproduction-17897-6a5838c7f600d2ce8749f4c1
